# UK International Data Transfer Agreement and Addendum

Jurisdiction: United Kingdom
Region: UK
Citation: International Data Transfer Agreement and International Data Transfer Addendum
Authority: UK Information Commissioner's Office
Source URL: https://ico.org.uk/for-organisations/uk-gdpr-guidance-and-resources/international-transfers/international-data-transfer-agreement-and-guidance/
Topics: cross_border_transfer, processor_contracts, third_party_sharing, accountability
Keywords: IDTA, UK Addendum, restricted transfer, transfer risk assessment

## Summary
UK transfer mechanisms for restricted transfers under UK GDPR, including IDTA and UK Addendum to EU SCCs.

## Key compliance obligations
- Select IDTA or UK Addendum for restricted transfers.
- Perform transfer risk assessment.
- Maintain transfer documentation and onward-transfer controls.
